sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: The purple square moved! It's now further along the path toward the blue circle. Let me track its new position and continue moving it along the path.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Track purple square position
for n in current_frame.segmentation['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'p' and n['pixels'] == 9:
        b = n['boundary']
        print(f"purple player: boundary={b} center~row={sum(r for r,c in b)//len(b)} col={sum(c for r,c in b)//len(b)}")

# List gray dots still on path
gray_dots = []
for n in current_frame.segmentation['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'G' and n['pixels'] == 1:
        b = n['boundary'][0]
        gray_dots.append(b)
gray_dots.sort()
print(f"\nRemaining gray dots ({len(gray_dots)}): {gray_dots[:5]} ... {gray_dots[-5:]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

Good, the purple square moved from [52-54, 9-11] to [50-52, 11-13]. It's moving along the diagonal path toward the blue circle. The gray dots still remaining form the path. The pattern is:
- Gray dots go: [57,6], [55,8], [53,10], [49,14], [47,16], ... [17,46]
- Player is now at [51, 12] (center)
- Next dot toward the blue circle would be [49, 14]
I need to keep clicking on the next gray dot along the path to move the player toward the blue circle. Let me continue this pattern. The path goes from bottom-left to top-right.
The remaining gray dots sorted: [[17, 46], [19, 44], [21, 42], [23, 40], [25, 38], ..., [47, 16], [49, 14], [53, 10], [55, 8], [57, 6]]
The player is at row 51, col 12. The next dot toward the blue circle (higher row, higher col... wait, the blue circle is at rows 11-19, cols 44-52, so it's at a LOWER row and HIGHER col).
So the path goes: from bottom-left (high row, low col) to top-right (low row, high col). The next dot after [51, 12] toward the blue circle would be [49, 14].
Let me click on [49, 14] to move the player there.

sections.content:

<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Player at [51, 12], next dot toward blue circle is [49, 14]
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 49, 'col': 14}])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
